hero.title: Destination Paradise
hero.description: Plan Zanzibar and Tanzania in one place: complete safari-and-beach packages, island excursions, mainland safaris, and an AI planner that helps shape the right route.

rooted.title: Locally rooted
rooted.text: Guides who grew up between Zanzibar's alleys and the Tanzanian bush. Every reef, recipe and ranger trail comes with a story you won't find in a guidebook.

group_or_private.title: Group or private
group_or_private.text: Shared dhow days with new friends, or a private tour, package or safari built around just your group. Same care, your pace.

handled.title: Everything handled
handled.text: Airport pickup, hotel transfers, dietary needs, last-minute changes. Message us and it's already sorted.

excursions.title: Excursions crafted by locals
excursions.lead: Hand-built island days with traditional boats, clear reefs, spice farms, and guides who grew up on these shores.

modes.ocean_text: Dhow sailing, sandbanks, snorkeling, dolphins, and reef days.
modes.culture_text: Stone Town, spice farms, Swahili food, dhow-building, and village visits.
modes.nature_text: Jozani forest, tortoises, mangroves, turtles, and family-friendly wildlife stops.

safari-blue.title: Safari Blue
safari-blue.description: A full-day dhow sailing adventure in Menai Bay — sandbank picnics, mangrove swims, snorkel reefs and seafood lunch.

mnemba.title: Mnemba Snorkeling & Trip to the North
mnemba.description: A full-day combining snorkeling around the Mnemba coral ring with relaxation on Nungwi Beach in northern Zanzibar.

spice-tour.title: Spice Tour
spice-tour.description: A guided plantation walk through cloves, cinnamon, nutmeg, pepper, herbs and medicinal plants — followed by a spice-infused Swahili lunch.

safaris.title: {{count}} safari starting points
safaris.lead: Choose a classic northern route, a southern wilderness fly-in, a quick safari from Zanzibar, or a special-interest trip for photography, family, culture, luxury, birds, chimps, and migration seasons.

modes.classic_text: Serengeti, Ngorongoro, Tarangire, Nyerere, Ruaha, Mahale and Katavi.
modes.fly_in_text: Short safaris from Zanzibar for guests already on the island.
modes.specialists_text: Honeymoon, family, photography, walking, birding, and bush-to-beach styles.

tarangire-day-trip.label: Quick safari
tarangire-day-trip.text: Fly in for a fast wildlife day from Zanzibar, with park fees, lunch, guide, and game drive handled.

serengeti-migration.label: Migration safari
serengeti-migration.text: A strong-selling Serengeti route for migration plains, big cats, camps, meals, and guided game drives.

nyerere-selous.label: Southern circuit
nyerere-selous.text: A wilder fly-in route with boat safari, walking safari, luxury camp, guide, and domestic flights.

packages.title: {{count}} packages — safari, Zanzibar, honeymoon, family & culture
packages.lead: Start with a researched package, then let us adjust the route, hotel level, flights, excursions, and pace around your dates.
packages.note: The full package page includes honeymoon, family, fly-in safari, migration, Kilimanjaro, marine, culture, digital nomad, and luxury options.

transfers.title: Arrive smoothly, before the trip even begins.
transfers.lead: Airport meet & greet, private AC vehicles, flight tracking, luggage help, and VIP arrival options across Zanzibar.

map.title: Zanzibar & Tanzania at a glance
map.lead: One country, two worlds. The island gives you Stone Town's heritage, dhows on the reef, beaches, culture, and ocean days. Cross to the mainland for northern icons, southern wilderness, western chimp routes, quick fly-ins, mountain days, and cultural stops.

gallery.title: Moments from shore to safari
gallery.lead: A wider look at Zanzibar and Tanzania: dhows, old streets, forest, spice farms, sandbanks, and mainland wildlife.

isa.quote: You can walk the mangroves and enjoy the best sunset ever. Thanks to the team — the warmth and care were unreal.

arturo.quote: Our guide was knowledgeable, upbeat and friendly. The dhow was beautiful, the lagoon unforgettable. Booked again before leaving.

coleman.quote: We smelled every spice, asked a hundred questions, and the team went above and beyond to answer them all. Best day of our trip.

newsletter.title: Sea stories and sunsets, every month
newsletter.description: Hand-written notes from the team — trip openings, shoulder-season deals, and the occasional spice recipe. One email a month. Never anything else.
newsletter.error: That did not go through. Please try again in a moment.
newsletter.privacy_prefix: By subscribing, you agree that we may store your email for Destination Paradise updates. See our

planner.title: Tell me about your dream trip
planner.lead: Chat with our AI planner — built on years of routes the team has walked. It'll ask the right questions, sketch a day-by-day itinerary, and send it straight to the team when you're ready.

bullets.asks_text: — pace, budget, water vs. wildlife, kids in tow, special dates.
bullets.builds_text: — nights per place, recommended hotels, excursion pacing.
bullets.sends_text: — confirm in the chat and we'll email a copy and reply within a day.

suggestions.label: Try:
suggestions.couple_prompt: We're a couple, 8 nights in October. We want a mix of beach, dhow sailing, and one big experience. Mid-range hotels.
suggestions.family_prompt: Family of four with kids 9 and 12. Two weeks in July. We want a few days of safari then unwind on a beach. Budget around $4k pp.
suggestions.solo_prompt: Solo traveler, 5 nights in February. Love spice markets, history, snorkeling. Boutique hotel under $200/night.

header.name: Paradise Planner
header.subtitle: Powered by Claude · usually replies instantly

welcome.p1: Karibu! 👋 I'm the Destination Paradise planner — let's sketch your trip together.
welcome.p2_prefix: To start, what kind of pace are you after?
welcome.p2_em: Beach & chill, mainland safari, deep cultural dive,

fallbacks.reply_blank: Hmm, I lost my train of thought. Could you say that again?
fallbacks.reply_after_token: Asante! I've sent this draft to the team — they'll be in touch within a day.
fallbacks.network_error: Pole sana — I couldn't reach the planner just now. Try again in a moment, or message the team directly via the WhatsApp button.
fallbacks.missing_email: Share your email in the chat first so we can reply.

status.sending: Sending your draft to the team…
status.updating: Sending your update to the team…
status.sent_title: Asante! ✓ Your draft is with the team.
status.sent_text: You'll get an email copy and a reply within a day. Need to change something? Just type below — I'll send the team an update. Or start a new plan:
status.updated_text: They'll see the revised plan. Type below to make another change, or start fresh:
status.error_title: Pole sana — that didn't go through.
status.error_text_default: Please try again, or message us on WhatsApp.

foot.note: Itineraries are drafts. A human reviews and prices everything before you book.
foot.privacy_prefix: Planner messages may be processed by Anthropic and emailed via Resend when you send a draft. See our

legend.title: Hotel season
legend.peak_text: festive & European summer (Dec–Jan, Jul–Aug). Premium rates, book early.
legend.high_text: busy dry months (Feb, Jun, Sep–Oct). Standard high-season rates.
legend.low_text: rainy season (Mar–May, Nov). Best deals; some hotels close in Apr–May.

descriptions.default: Mostly sunny with a soft Indian Ocean breeze. The long rains are easing — mornings are clear, and the reef visibility holds through early afternoon.
descriptions.clear_night: Clear night over the channel — warm air, gentle breeze off the reef.
descriptions.clear_day: Clear skies and steady Indian Ocean breeze — ideal beach and snorkeling conditions.
descriptions.mostly_sunny_day: Mostly sunny with high cloud — reef visibility holds through the afternoon.
descriptions.mostly_clear_night: Mostly clear night with high cloud — warm and calm.
descriptions.partly_cloudy_day: Partly cloudy with warm trade winds — comfortable beach and dhow conditions.
descriptions.partly_cloudy_night: Partly cloudy night — soft trade winds and warm air.
descriptions.overcast_day: Overcast but warm — good light for island walks, spice farms, and culture stops.
descriptions.overcast_night: Overcast and warm tonight — calm seas expected by morning.
descriptions.fog: Coastal fog easing through the morning — clearer by midday.
descriptions.drizzle: Light drizzle drifting in from the channel — short, warm, and passing.
descriptions.rain_long: Rain showers passing through — typical of the long rains, mornings often clear.
descriptions.tropical_showers: Tropical showers between sunny spells — bring a light layer.
descriptions.thunderstorm: Thunderstorms expected — best to plan indoor time, a slower lunch, or a spa stop.

about.image_alt: Crowned cranes in long grass at dawn
about.signature_role: Zanzibar & Tanzania · Born from a dream
about.lead: Destination Paradise was born from a dream — to connect people to the beauty, culture and spirit of Tanzania. After years of preparation, we are officially launching from Unguja, Zanzibar.

contact.title: Send us an email
contact.lead: Tell us whether you want a complete package, a few Zanzibar excursions, a mainland safari, or a custom mix. Send group size, rough dates, budget, and pace — we'll come back within a day with ideas, availability, and a real price.

form.name: Your name
form.subject: Subject
form.subject_placeholder: Trip dates, group size, anything specific
form.status_ok: ✓ Asante — we got it. We'll come back to you within a day.
